company_business: AI-powered Odoo ERP for UAE heavy industry operators with integrated finance, maintenance, supply-chain control, and compliance-by-design deployment.
conversation_purpose: Book a scoping call with Finance/CFO and plant/operations leadership.
key_pains: High asset and maintenance costs with low visibility
Inventory, procurement, and production planning are disconnected
Cost-to-serve and margin analysis is delayed
Compliance and audit readiness depend on spreadsheet workarounds
discovery_questions: How do you currently track OEE, downtime cost, and maintenance spend?
Can you view real margin by product line or plant in near real time?
How are procurement and inventory tied to production and finance?
Where do manual entries create risk in month-end and tax filings?
How quickly can your team provide plant-to-finance audit evidence?

objection_handlers.objection: Our operations are too complex for this.
objection_handlers.response: Complexity is exactly where integrated architecture helps most. We phase rollout by plant/process and prioritize control points first, then scale.

objection_handlers.objection: We cannot spare team bandwidth now.
objection_handlers.response: Understood. We design rollout around your operational calendar and minimize load through structured workshops and prebuilt accelerators.

objection_handlers.objection: We need to see proof first.
objection_handlers.response: Absolutely. The scoping call includes architecture walkthrough, module fit, and an evidence-based ROI model for your operating profile.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.best_for: Core finance + inventory baseline for smaller plants

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.best_for: Integrated plant operations and finance controls

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.best_for: Multi-site heavy industry with advanced analytics

compliance: UAE VAT and Corporate Tax readiness
